_purpose: Consolidated GROUND-TRUTH attestation for all place/person/ship names in LOGH VII revival content. attested=true => name appears in the official manual PDF and/or byte-verified client MsgDat strings. attested=false => no ground-truth source found anywhere (AI_INVENTED candidate; may be real canon but needs external/prior-game sourcing).

_ground_truth_sources.manual_starmap: gin7manual.pdf p101 (80 /Text annotation Rects -> system coords)
